MRI OF THE LUMBAR SPINE WITH WHOLE SPINE SCREENING
,31/01/2022,Multiplanar multiecho MRI of the lumbar spine was performed. T2 weighted sagittal whole spine screening was also performed.

Clinical profile: right leg pain.

Mild levoscoliosis of the lumbar spine is noted. Lumbar vertebrae are normal in height and signal intensity. Multilevel Modic type II changes are seen in lumbar vertebral endplates. There is no other focal vertebral lesion or marrow edema.

Mild diffuse disc bulge is seen at L3-4 level without neural compression.

Diffuse disc bulge with right paracentral extrusion showing caudal migration is seen at L4-5 level indenting right L5 nerve root.

Bilateral facet arthrosis and ligamentum flavum hypertrophy are seen at L4-5 and L5-S1 levels.

The cord is of normal signal intensity. No abnormality is detected in the conus medullaris.

No abnormal pre or para vertebral soft tissue is seen. Bilateral SI joints show no abnormality.

MRI OF BOTH HIP JOINTS
,31/01/2022,Multiplanar, multiecho MRI of both hip joints were acquired.

Clinical profile: right leg pain.

There is no evidence of hip joint effusion.

The signal intensity of visualized portions of bilateral femoral bones and the bones forming the pelvic girdle is normal. No marrow edema is identified.

There is no fracture, dislocation or bone destruction.

No abnormal soft tissue mass lesion is identified.

The visualized muscles and tendons appear unremarkable.,No significant abnormality detected. ,DR.DESAI SANJAY

Clinical profile: Right parotid swelling ?right Warthin's tumour.

RIGHT PAROTID GLAND
A well-defined solid cystic lesion in the right parotid gland in the posterior part of superficial lobe.

-Dimensions= lesion measures 2.1 x 2.3 x 3.4 cms (AP x TR x CC).

-Internal morphology = Few areas of hemorrhage and cystic areas. No calcific foci seen. Appears hyperdense on plain CT secondary to hemorrhage.
-Enhancement pattern=heterogeneous enhancement with type B curve on dynamic contrast study (gradual enhancement and no significant washout)
-Extension into deep lobe =No extension to deep lobe. The lesion remaining just lateral to the ECA along its superior portion. It is compressing the right retromandibular vein at places.

D25/7750,Right parotid tumor 3 x 3 cm solid cystic lesion.

,A) Right superficial partotidectomy.
B) Right parotid node.

,A) Received in formalin is a specimen labeled "Right superficial parotidectomy," consisting of the parotid gland measuring 4 × 3 × 2 cm, surrounded by adipose tissue of variable thickness. A well-circumscribed solid cystic lesion is identified, measuring 3 × 3 × 2.5 cm, with a solid area measuring 3 × 2 × 1.5 cm. The lesion is solid-cystic, homogenous, firm, and gray-white. On cut section, the solid areas show hemorrhages and yellowish discoloration. The cystic spaces are filled with thick brown fluid. The remainder of the gland is tan-yellow and unremarkable. External surface is inked black for identification.

B) Received in formalin is a specimen parotid nodule measuring 4 x 1.5 x 1 cm. 2 lymph nodes identified. Largest LN measures 1.5 x 1.0 x 0.5 cm, grossly unremarkable.

Cassette summary:
A1 to A5: Solid cystic area, A6: Normal saliv
